name: marketing-content-generation briefing bundle
description: Portable design/brand/motion/layout knowledge for generating on-brand LinkedIn/Reddit content. Concatenate the files in `order` (after substituting the placeholders) and inject into any LLM system prompt.

placeholders.{{BRAND_NAME}}: display name (e.g. the creator's full name shown on the signature)
placeholders.{{BRAND_MONOGRAM}}: short monogram for the signature node (e.g. initials)
placeholders.{{BRAND_SUBTITLE}}: role tagline shown under the name (e.g. 'AI Systems · Automation · Design')
placeholders.{{BRAND_EMAIL}}: contact email, hidden by default (service/final-frame only)
